branchManagement.title: Branch Management
branchManagement.description: Manage branches, the default workspace and active status.
branchManagement.formDescription: Define branch information and its system-wide usage status.
branchManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this branch? The default branch cannot be deleted.
branchManagement.defaultHint: Used first at sign-in and in default operations.
branchManagement.activeHint: Inactive branches cannot be selected for new operations.
